name: Cake Doughnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1 tablespoon granulated sugar and 4 tablespoons of sugar replacement with the buttermilk, beating well.
2. Add the beaten egg to the mixture and stir until combined.
3. Gradually add the flour, baking soda, baking powder, nutmeg, cinnamon, vanilla extract, and salt, stirring just until blended.
4. Heat oil in a deep pot or pan to 375°F (190°C).
5. Using a doughnut dropper, place small portions of dough into the hot oil.
6. Fry the doughnuts until they are golden brown, turning them occasionally for even cooking.
7. Remove the doughnuts from the oil using tongs or a slotted spoon and let drain on paper towels.
Serving: 1 serving (1 donut)
Calories: 30
